answers.question: Starred variable type
answers.answer: Starred variable typed as list[T], T inferred from RHS element type, matching Py3.12.

answers.question: Star in function calls
answers.answer: Splat in function calls (*args, **kwargs) also addressed — match Py3.12 behavior.

answers.question: Nested unpacking with star
answers.answer: Include nested destructuring with stars (e.g., a, (*b, c) = ...) — full Py3.12 behavior.

answers.question: Codegen runtime helper
answers.answer: Runtime helper: runtime::unpack_star(iter, n_before, n_after) for cleaner codegen.
